notes: E4.1 added User.locale field to CRUD routes
E4.2 added messageKey/messageParams to all error envelopes
E4.2 replaced all hardcoded error messages with tServer() resolved translations
E4.2 mapped Zod validation errors to i18n translation keys
E4.3 created shared formatters (no direct API endpoint changes)
All error responses should include messageKey when the error carries one
Validation field-level errors are resolved via tServer() from Zod error map

seed_data: At least one active company with companyId
A SUPER_ADMIN user for admin operations
An ADMIN user for standard operations
A STAFF user for restricted operations
A user with MFA enabled for MFA tests
A user with MFA not enabled for MFA setup tests

endpoints.description: Authenticate user with email/password, optionally with MFA token

test_cases.name: Login - happy path with valid credentials

db_verification.query: SELECT id FROM refresh_tokens WHERE user_id = :userId AND revoked_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
db_verification.expected: Refresh token row created for user

test_cases.name: Login - happy path returns locale in user object (E4.1)
Login - MFA required returns requiresMfa flag
Login - happy path with valid MFA token
Login - missing email returns 400 with validation messageKey (E4.2)
Login - missing password returns 400 with validation messageKey (E4.2)
Login - invalid email format returns 400 with i18n validation error
Login - invalid mfaToken format returns 400
Login - non-existent email returns 401 with i18n messageKey (E4.2)
Login - wrong password returns 401 with i18n messageKey (E4.2)
Login - invalid MFA token returns 401 with MFA_INVALID messageKey (E4.2)
Login - inactive user returns 401 (timing-safe, same as invalid credentials)

endpoints.description: Refresh access token using httpOnly refresh token cookie

test_cases.name: Refresh - happy path with valid refresh token cookie

db_verification.query: SELECT revoked_at FROM refresh_tokens WHERE token_hash = :oldTokenHash
db_verification.expected: Old refresh token should have revoked_at set (token rotation)

test_cases.name: Refresh - no cookie returns 401 with UNAUTHORIZED messageKey (E4.2)
Refresh - expired token returns 401 with UNAUTHORIZED messageKey
Refresh - revoked token returns 401
Logout - happy path revokes token and clears cookie

db_verification.query: SELECT revoked_at FROM refresh_tokens WHERE token_hash = :tokenHash
db_verification.expected: Refresh token revoked_at should be set

test_cases.name: Logout - no cookie still returns 200 (graceful)

endpoints.description: Initialize MFA TOTP setup for authenticated user

test_cases.name: MFA setup - happy path returns secret and URI

db_verification.query: SELECT mfa_secret FROM users WHERE id = :userId
db_verification.expected: mfa_secret should be set, mfa_enabled should still be false

test_cases.name: MFA setup - already enabled returns 409 with MFA_ALREADY_ENABLED messageKey (E4.2)
MFA setup - no auth token returns 401

endpoints.description: Verify TOTP token and enable MFA on account

test_cases.name: MFA verify - happy path enables MFA

db_verification.query: SELECT mfa_enabled FROM users WHERE id = :userId

test_cases.name: MFA verify - missing token returns 400 with validation messageKey
MFA verify - invalid token format returns 400
MFA verify - wrong TOTP token returns 401 with MFA_INVALID messageKey (E4.2)
MFA verify - setup not initiated returns 400 with MFA_SETUP_REQUIRED messageKey (E4.2)

endpoints.description: Admin resets MFA for another user

test_cases.name: MFA reset - happy path admin resets another user

db_verification.query: SELECT mfa_enabled, mfa_secret FROM users WHERE id = :targetUserId
db_verification.expected: mfa_enabled should be false, mfa_secret should be null

test_cases.name: MFA reset - missing userId returns 400 with validation messageKey
MFA reset - invalid userId format returns 400
MFA reset - self reset returns 403 with MFA_CANNOT_RESET_SELF messageKey (E4.2)
MFA reset - user not found returns 404 with USER_NOT_FOUND messageKey (E4.2)
MFA reset - cross-company by non-SUPER_ADMIN returns 403 (E4.2)

endpoints.description: Create a new user within the current company

test_cases.name: Create user - happy path with all fields including locale (E4.1)

db_verification.query: SELECT id, email, first_name, last_name, locale, is_active, company_id FROM users WHERE email = 'newuser@test.com'
db_verification.expected: User row created with locale='en-GB', is_active=true, correct company_id

test_cases.name: Create user - happy path with minimal fields (locale defaults to 'en')

db_verification.query: SELECT locale FROM users WHERE email = 'minimal@test.com'

test_cases.name: Create user - missing email returns 400 with i18n validation error (E4.2)

body_structure.error.details.email: array with 'Email is required' or translated equivalent

test_cases.name: Create user - missing password returns 400
Create user - password too short returns 400 with minLength messageKey (E4.2)
Create user - invalid role enum returns 400
Create user - invalid locale format returns 400 (E4.1)
Create user - duplicate email returns 409 with DUPLICATE_EMAIL messageKey (E4.2)
Create user - non-SUPER_ADMIN creating SUPER_ADMIN returns 403 (E4.2)
Create user - no auth token returns 401

endpoints.description: Create a company profile for the current company

test_cases.name: Create company profile - happy path

db_verification.query: SELECT company_name, default_language FROM company_profiles WHERE company_id = :companyId
db_verification.expected: Company profile row created with default_language='en'

test_cases.name: Create company profile - no auth returns 401

endpoints.description: List users in the current company with pagination

test_cases.name: List users - happy path returns paginated list with locale field (E4.1)

body_structure.data: array of user objects, each containing locale field

test_cases.name: List users - each user object contains locale field (E4.1)
List users - pagination with cursor
List users - search filter

body_structure.data: array of users matching 'admin' in email/firstName/lastName

test_cases.name: List users - isActive filter
List users - search with no results returns empty array
List users - no auth returns 401

endpoints.description: Get a single user by ID

test_cases.name: Get user - happy path returns user with locale field (E4.1)
Get user - non-existent ID returns 404 with messageKey (E4.2)
Get user - invalid UUID format returns 400
Get company profile - happy path returns profile with defaultLanguage

body_structure.data.defaultLanguage: string (locale code used in i18n fallback chain)

test_cases.name: Get company profile - no auth returns 401

endpoints.description: Update user profile fields (firstName, lastName, locale)

test_cases.name: Update user - happy path update locale (E4.1)

db_verification.query: SELECT locale FROM users WHERE id = :userId

test_cases.name: Update user - happy path update firstName

db_verification.query: SELECT first_name FROM users WHERE id = :userId

test_cases.name: Update user - invalid locale format returns 400 (E4.1)
Update user - locale too long returns 400 (max 10 chars)
Update user - non-existent user returns 404
Update role - happy path SUPER_ADMIN assigns ADMIN

db_verification.query: SELECT role FROM user_companies WHERE user_id = :userId AND company_id = :companyId

test_cases.name: Update role - invalid role enum returns 400
Update role - missing role returns 400
Update role - non-SUPER_ADMIN assigning SUPER_ADMIN returns 403 with messageKey (E4.2)
Update modules - happy path

db_verification.query: SELECT enabled_modules FROM users WHERE id = :userId
db_verification.expected: enabled_modules should contain SYSTEM, FINANCE, SALES

test_cases.name: Update modules - invalid module name returns 400
Update modules - empty array clears modules

db_verification.query: SELECT enabled_modules FROM users WHERE id = :userId

test_cases.name: Update company profile - happy path update defaultLanguage (i18n fallback chain)

db_verification.query: SELECT default_language FROM company_profiles WHERE company_id = :companyId

test_cases.name: Update company profile - no auth returns 401
Deactivate user - happy path sets isActive=false

db_verification.query: SELECT is_active FROM users WHERE id = :targetUserId; SELECT revoked_at FROM refresh_tokens WHERE user_id = :targetUserId AND revoked_at IS NULL

test_cases.name: Deactivate user - self-deactivation returns 422 with SELF_DEACTIVATION messageKey (E4.2)
Deactivate user - non-existent user returns 404
Deactivate user - no auth returns 401

endpoints.description: Cross-cutting i18n error envelope tests (E4.2) — apply to any endpoint that returns errors

test_cases.name: Error envelope - AppError includes messageKey when set (E4.2)
Error envelope - messageKey omitted when not set (no undefined in JSON)

body_structure.error.messageKey_absent_or_present: messageKey should not be 'undefined' string in JSON

test_cases.name: Error envelope - validation error details contain translated messages (E4.2 Zod mapping)

body_structure.error.details: Record<string, string[]> with field-level translated messages
body_structure.error.details_note: Messages should be resolved via tServer() not raw Zod messages

test_cases.name: Error envelope - 500 errors use generic translated message (E4.2)

body_structure.error.message: An internal server error occurred (resolved via tServer('errors:SERVER_ERROR'))

test_cases.name: Error envelope - ValidationError includes messageParams for field context (E4.2)

body_structure.error.details.locale: array of translated messages with field name interpolated

test_cases.name: Company context - invalid X-Company-ID header returns 400 with i18n messageKey (E4.2)
RBAC guard - insufficient permissions returns 403 with FORBIDDEN messageKey (E4.2)
Company context - inactive company returns 403 with COMPANY_ACCESS_DENIED messageKey (E4.2)
